SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
SELECT 
       alertGroupID
      ,alertGroupCode
      ,alertGroupDescription
      ,displayText
      ,sortOrder
      ,isActive
      ,hash(concat(
          IfNull(alertGroupID,"") 
      ,"|",IfNull(alertGroupCode,"") 
      ,"|",IfNull(alertGroupDescription,"")
      ,"|",IfNull(displayText,"")
      ,"|",IfNull(sortOrder,"")
      ,"|",IfNull(isActive,false)
      )) AS hashKey 
FROM( 
SELECT 
       AlertGroupID AS alertGroupID
      ,AlertGroupCode AS alertGroupCode
      ,AlertGroupDescription AS alertGroupDescription
      ,DisplayText AS displayText
      ,SortOrder AS sortOrder
      ,Active AS isActive
  FROM AlertGroup
  ) a
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t 
USING (SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript) s 
    ON IfNull(s.alertGroupID,"") = IfNull(t.alertGroupID,"") 
WHEN MATCHED AND t.hashKey <> s.hashKey 
THEN UPDATE SET 
    alertGroupID = s.alertGroupID
    ,alertGroupCode = s.alertGroupCode
    ,alertGroupDescription = s.alertGroupDescription
    ,displayText = s.displayText
    ,sortOrder = s.sortOrder
    ,isActive = s.isActive
    ,hashKey = s.hashKey 
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN  
INSERT(
    alertGroupID
    ,alertGroupCode
    ,alertGroupDescription
    ,displayText
    ,sortOrder
    ,isActive
    ,hashKey
) 
VALUES ( 
    s.alertGroupID
    ,s.alertGroupCode
    ,s.alertGroupDescription
    ,s.displayText
    ,s.sortOrder
    ,s.isActive
    ,s.hashKey
)
